name: group-connected-sharepoint-sites-and-microsoft-teams-relationship-report
title: Group-Connected SharePoint Sites and Microsoft Teams Relationship Report
shortDescription: Generate a tenant-wide CSV report of Microsoft 365 Group-connected SharePoint sites, ownership, and Microsoft Teams linkage.
longDescription: This script inventories Microsoft 365 Group-connected SharePoint Online sites, identifies associated group owners, determines whether each group is connected to Microsoft Teams, and exports the results to a timestamped CSV report for governance and operational review.

thumbnails.alt: Preview of the sample Group-Connected SharePoint Sites and Microsoft Teams Relationship Report

references.name: Want to learn more about PnP PowerShell and the cmdlets
references.description: Check out the PnP PowerShell site to get started and for the reference to the cmdlets.
